Scenario: Learner logs in via mobile using valid credentials
Precondition: User account exists and mobile app or mobile web is accessible
Test Steps:
Open login screen
Enter valid username/email and password
Tap Login
Expected Result: Learner successfully signs in and lands on homepage

Scenario: Invalid password shows clear error on mobile
Test Steps:
Enter valid username/email and wrong password
Tap Login
Expected Result: Login is rejected and a clear error message appears without breaking layout

Scenario: Learner logs in using SSO on mobile when SSO is enabled
Test Steps:
Tap SSO login
Complete IdP authentication
Expected Result: User returns authenticated to the mobile experience

Scenario: First-time login with default password prompts password change
Precondition: New learner account exists with default password
Test Steps: Login using default password
Expected Result: System allows access only through the required first-time password change flow

Scenario: Learner requests forgot password from mobile login screen
Test Steps:
Tap Forgot Password
Enter email
Submit
Expected Result: Reset email is triggered and success confirmation is shown

Scenario: Learner resets password from email link on mobile
Precondition: Valid reset email has been received
Test Steps:
Open reset link from email on mobile
Enter new password
Confirm
Expected Result: Password resets successfully and learner can log in with the new password

Scenario: Learner changes password from account settings on mobile
Test Steps:
Open profile or account settings
Enter current password and new password
Save
Expected Result: Password is updated successfully

Scenario: Wrong current password blocks password change
Test Steps: Attempt password change using wrong current password
Expected Result: Password change is rejected with a clear validation message

Scenario: Show-hide password control works on mobile without covering input
Test Steps: Tap show or hide password icon repeatedly
Expected Result: Password visibility toggles correctly and input remains usable

Scenario: Mobile keyboard does not hide login CTA or validation message
Test Steps: Tap username and password fields until keyboard appears
Expected Result: Primary CTA and validation state remain reachable and readable

Scenario: Learner logs out securely from mobile
Test Steps:
Open account menu
Tap Logout
Expected Result: Session ends and returning to protected pages requires login again

Scenario: Expired session returns learner safely to login screen on reopen
Precondition: Learner is logged in and session timeout is configured
Test Steps:
Leave app idle until session expires
Reopen protected page
Expected Result: Learner is redirected to login without exposing protected data
